segments.text: Right there, I thought he was in the back!
segments.original_text: 後ろにいたんじゃないかというところで

segments.text: If he's using the bomb to shift the timing...
segments.original_text: ボムを使ってタイミングずらすのであれば

full_text: Right there, I thought he was in the back! Out of shield grab from... If he's using the bomb to shift the timing...
